# blender-mcp
> AI-powered 3D creation and automation via FastMCP — Blender modeling, animation, rendering, and scene management.

## Core Reference
- [llms-full.txt](llms-full.txt): Full tool reference, API docs, architecture, env vars, and installation.

## Docs
- [Readme](README.md): Project overview, architecture, and quality stack.
- [Changelog](CHANGELOG.md): Release history and transitions.
- [Development](docs/development/README.md): Best practices for AI-assisted development.
- [MCP Technical](docs/mcp-technical/README.md): Blender-MCP bridge and session management.

## Configuration
- [Pyproject](pyproject.toml): Python project configuration.
- [Cargo](Cargo.toml): Rust project configuration.
- [Package](webapp/frontend/package.json): Node.js webapp configuration.
